releases.name: guIDE v0.4.9
releases.body:
Cloud channel routing parity with local: dual stream filter on content and reasoning, glued JSON parser fixes, thinking segment scrub on finalize, plan-mode blocked-tool guidance.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.8...v0.4.9

releases.name: guIDE v0.4.6
releases.body:
## Summary

- **Tool JSON leak fix:** Prevention-first stream routing — tool-shaped output no longer forwards to prose (`isVisibleToolArtifact` + stream FSM). Structural `findToolCallRanges` strips fences, tool objects, and continuation tails (e.g. split `browser_click` JSON). Safety-net scrub runs every generation round.
- **Tab overflow menu:** New persistent **⋯** on the editor tab bar (plus existing right-click menu): Close, Close Others, Close All, Close Saved, Copy Path, Reload (browser), Split editor.
- **System prompt:** Clarification / `ask_question` discipline, browser and auth flows, explicit rule to keep tool JSON in tool cards not chat prose.

## Test plan

1. Agent/browser turn — no raw JSON under tool cards (collapsed or expanded)
2. Editor tab bar — ⋯ opens tab actions menu
3. Login flow — model uses snapshot + ask_question instead of guessing credentials

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.5...v0.4.6


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.5...v0.4.6

releases.name: guIDE v0.4.5
releases.body:
## Summary

- **B3 — Plan mode prompt:** Three-tier guidance (conversational prose-only, build/plan workflow, plan-ready revision) injected via system prompt only — no user-message regex. Clarifies that `web_search` is unavailable in Plan mode.
- **B9 — Per-conversation plan:** New chat no longer resurrects plans from disk via `emitExistingPlanIfFound` on every message. `planSession` is saved and restored with `guide-chat-sessions` when switching conversations.
- **B6 — Todo discipline:** Stronger build-phase prompt, tool descriptions, and post-`write_todos` reminder so the model calls `update_todo` during Agent/Build implementation (live TodoDropdown progress).
- **B8 — Scrollbars:** Thinner Monaco scrollbars (no arrows) and theme-aligned sliders; PDF preview uses a thin-scrollbar wrapper.

## Deferred (unchanged from v0.4.4)

- Blocked-tool retry loop / auto-continue guard when Plan mode tools are rejected (B1/B2).

## Test plan

1. Plan mode → new chat → no PlanCard from another conversation
2. Conv 1 plan → conv 2 clean → return to conv 1 → PlanCard restored
3. "how r u" → prose only; vague build → plan file + todos (not implementation)
4. Build/Agent → `update_todo` in logs as steps complete
5. Monaco + PDF → modern thin scrollbars

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.4...v0.4.5


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.4...v0.4.5

releases.name: guIDE v0.4.4
releases.body:
## Summary

- **Stream filter:** Tool JSON is buffered during streaming and never forwarded to chat prose; truncated fences are discarded at flush instead of leaked.
- **Tool repair + loop:** Truncated `edit_file`/`write_file` recovery from full response text; repair failures inject validation errors and continue the tool loop instead of ending the turn with corrupted UI.
- **Plan phase FSM:** Artifact-based `awaiting_plan` / `plan_ready` / `building` — auto-continue only when no plan artifacts exist; no user-message regex.
- **Plan tools:** Allow `create_directory` for `.guide/plans` and `edit_file` for `.guide/plans/*.plan.md`; prefer plan file paths over false positives like `Three.js`.
- **Plan-ready lifecycle:** Disk scan on plan-mode chat start; re-fire after `write_file`, `edit_file`, and `write_todos`.
- **UX:** PlanCard hidden until plan path exists; session preserved on revision; per-token file-content streaming.

## Test plan

1. Initial plan prompt → plan + todos; chat must not contain raw tool:` JSON
2. Q&A on ready plan → prose answer only; no auto-continue nudge
3. Plan revision via `edit_file` → ToolCallCard visible; file updated; no JSON wall
4. Build only via button/Ctrl+Enter — chat text does not trigger app-side Build
5. `create_directory` for `.guide/plans` executes or loops with feedback

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.3...v0.4.4

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.4.3...v0.4.4

releases.name: guIDE v0.3.179
releases.body:
Terminal prompt fix, hamburger menu, vision/mmproj, force-send inject, PDF preview, Monolith Gray default, bundled Playwright Chromium. CPU installer uploading when CI completes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FileShot/guide-3.0/compare/v0.3.178...v0.3.179

releases.name: guIDE v0.3.177
releases.body: Includes chat UX (175), image preview + debug logging (176), and CI icon fix (177). Windows and macOS builds from CI; Linux AppImage pending 178.
